summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a legendary show highlighted by an epic Dark Star that flows into St. Stephen
review: Both reviewers rave about this famous Florida performance, singling out the Dark Star as a standout moment that coils, snarls and segues beautifully into St. Stephen. The recording is a sound‑board source and is described as solid enough to stream on a good stereo system, with no technical complaints.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed five‑star reviews praise the musical performance (especially Dark Star) and note a clean soundboard source; limited number of reviews reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific issues mentioned; reviewers consider it suitable for streaming on a decent stereo, implying clear and balanced board recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is described as "spazzy and feral" with the Dark Star leading into St. Stephen, creating a high‑energy, psychedelic flow that many fans love.
